title: Write Bulk Metric Import Tutorial Documentation
description:
Create a WordPress tutorial covering the bulk metric import feature from Excel and CSV files. Published at the tutorials section of the DataTools Pro website.

Tutorial URL: https://datatoolspro.com/tutorials/bulk-metric-import-from-excel-and-csv/
acceptance_criteria: Tutorial published on WordPress at the specified URL
Tutorial covers bulk metric import from Excel and CSV
Tutorial is accessible from the tutorials navigation
implementation_notes: Documentation task — tutorial written and published on WordPress.
